title: Amtech A2311 Wooden Hoe Handle Replacement, Beech, 47” (1175mm long)
features: STRONG: This hoe handle is made from beech for durability
FITS MOST HEADS: Approximately 1175mm (47") long, it is suitable for use with most standard sized hoe heads
PRACTICAL SIZE: 1175mm length provides reach and stability.
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Easy to store, making it a practical addition to any toolbox.
description: Product Description Garden hoe is an ideal product for weeding, chopping, and clearing the unwanted garden growth. This Amtech 2311 hoe handle can be fitted to any standard size hoe-heads and it is compatible with A2310 hoe head. It is 47” long or it has 1175mm length. Because it is made up of beech, the handle is strong and durable. So, if you want to clean large and open areas then this product is for you. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your gardening requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your outdoor living area looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products Safety Warning No Box Contains Hoe handle See more
